# GitNexus Active Scope

This file is auto-generated by the CodeBrain VS Code extension.
Do not edit this file manually because it is refreshed when active context changes.

## Current Active Context
- Type: group
- Name: pancake
- Default repo argument for GitNexus MCP tools: @pancake

## Repositories In Active Group
- .\pancake-be\ -> pancake-be | path: (not indexed in current workspace)
- .\pancake-fe\ -> pancake-fe | path: (not indexed in current workspace)

## Agent Rules
1. If the user does not specify a repo/group, use the default repo argument above for GitNexus tools that support `repo`.
2. For group context, keep the `@group` form exactly as shown in this file.
3. If no active context is set, first discover repos with `mcp_gitnexus_list_repos` and ask the user to choose scope.
